items.title: England's one-day woes continue with India defeat
items.summary: Brendon McCullum's reduced role as England's white-ball coach begins with a reminder of how much work there is to do on a one-day team beaten by India.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Man Utd sign Tielemans for £35m from Aston Villa
items.summary: Manchester United complete the signing of Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa on a five-year deal.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Spain vs. France odds, prediction, time: 2026 World Cup semifinal picks from expert on 25-16 run
items.summary: SportsLine's Jon Eimer reveals his France vs. Spain best bets for their FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinal match on Tuesday
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
